title: 4Sum
description:
Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return all unique quadruplets `[a, b, c, d]` such that a + b + c + d = target.

The solution set must not contain duplicate quadruplets.
hints: Similar to 3Sum, but with two fixed elements instead of one.
Sort the array first, then use two nested loops for the first two elements.
Use two pointers for the remaining two elements to achieve O(n³) time complexity.
